nodes.label: AI as lesson preparation tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to come up with sample problems for students. I also use AI to research curriculum and plan lessons around them.

nodes.label: Human pedagogical creativity and empathy
nodes.grounding_span: I like to think of ways to explain the process to students that might resonate with them and their learning style.

nodes.label: AI problem-solving process vs human approach
nodes.label_negative: AI problem-solving process aligned with human approach
nodes.grounding_span: the process the AI uses to solve a problem might be different than the way a human would go about solving the problem

nodes.label: AI as preparation for tutoring sessions
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for tutor's role
nodes.grounding_span: using AI helps me be extra prepared for each session I teach

nodes.label: Effective student learning and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I like to think of ways to explain the process to students that might resonate with them and their learning style

nodes.label: Professional competence and preparedness
nodes.grounding_span: I typically feel satisfied when I feel that I have prepared well for a session

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for lesson preparation
nodes.grounding_span: I typically feel satisfied when I feel that I have prepared well for a session. I feel that using AI helps me be extra prepared for each session I teach.

nodes.label: Resistance to AI solving problems for students
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like asking the AI to solve the problems because I like to think of ways to explain the process to students

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that teaching requires a human element and sometimes creativity in order to get certain points across when students are struggling.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I will typically start broad and ask it to generate around 10 practice problems... I then might start to refine the process by picking out the ones I think will be more helpful

nodes.label: Domain boundary maintenance — keeping pedagogical work human
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like asking the AI to solve the problems because I like to think of ways to explain the process to students
